title: Fiery Silky American Sardines Stew
description: A bold, onepot stew that blends the smoky depth of sardines with silky coconut milk and a fiery kick, delivering a highprotein, comforting meal in minutes.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large, heavy‑bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, minced garlic, and bell pepper; sauté until the vegetables soften, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the cumin and smoked paprika, cooking until fragrant, 30 seconds.
Pour in the tomato sauce, coconut milk, and fresh lime juice; bring to a gentle simmer.
Carefully fold in the sardines, breaking them into pieces while they warm through, 3 minutes.
Add the rinsed quinoa and 2 cups of water or low‑sodium broth; stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the quinoa is tender and the stew thickens, about 15 minutes.
Taste and season with salt if needed.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with chopped fresh herbs, and enjoy the silky, fiery flavor.
